examples: I wish he’d articulate his words more clearly.

definitions.text: To explain; to put into words; to make something specific.
examples: I like this painting, but I can’t articulate why.
(Can we add an example for this sense?)

definitions.text: Speaking in a clear and effective manner; having both good articulation and good elocution.
examples: She’s a bright, articulate young woman.

definitions.text: Consisting of segments united by joints.
examples: The robot arm was articulate in two directions.

definitions.text: An animal of the subkingdom Articulata.
